meaning: n.苏门答腊岛(在印尼西部)
examples: A tapir found in Malaya and Sumatra.
Sumatra itself is part of an island arc.
First impressions of Sumatra are not good.
Ms. Barnes now leads me to a large, red textile from the tip of Sumatra.
On July 16, West Sumatra governor Muchlis Ibrahim sent a letter to the central authorities.
